name: TAO Balance Reclaim Continuation v1
edge_mechanism: trend pullback continuation after deeper value reclaim into structural support
thesis: TAO 4h is the best primary lane for testing whether a deeper pullback that reclaims balance can restart the trend once support stabilizes. The edge is the reclaim-and-hold after a meaningful reset, not shallow EMA touch continuation.
invalidation_condition: Abort if balance reclaims remain too sparse or if reclaimed pullbacks fail to produce enough second-leg continuation after costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price pulls back materially inside an uptrend, reclaims balance, holds structural support, and then resumes higher.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Deeper pullbacks can reset weak trend positioning. If price reclaims balance instead of merely bouncing, the resumed leg can be cleaner than shallow dip-buy logic.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: TAO 4h is appropriate because pullback-and-reclaim structure is visible and follow-through can be meaningful on this asset.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: Reclaims may occur, but the market may still chop sideways and fail to extend enough after entry.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries are dense enough but follow-through is weak, reduce runner ambition before changing reclaim conditions.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: A reasonable set of pullback-reclaim continuations with first target carrying most expectancy and occasional larger resumption legs.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: TAO 4h plus one cross-lane show credible density and positive post-cost continuation after balance reclaim.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, sparse mirage, or repeated reclaimed pullbacks that fail to resume.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; reclaim, support hold, and trend participation are complementary
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed by broad pullback-reclaim grammar rather than exact reversal candles

validation_basket.why_included: Best lane for pullback-reclaim trend continuation in the live basket.
validation_basket.continue_if: Reclaims occur often enough and continuation pays after costs.
validation_basket.rotate_away_if: Reclaims are sparse or fail to resume.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Deeper pullbacks that reclaim balance and restart the up-leg.

validation_basket.why_included: Checks whether the same pullback-reclaim mechanism survives on a cleaner major lane.
validation_basket.continue_if: ETH shows similar reclaim continuation with acceptable density.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Cleaner but less explosive balance-reclaim continuations.

validation_basket.why_included: Tests whether the same reclaim logic survives on another high-beta lane.
validation_basket.continue_if: AXS still shows structured reclaim-and-go behavior.
validation_basket.rotate_away_if: Volatility turns the setup into noise.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Fewer but larger resumption bursts than ETH.
